meaning: adj.多船体的 多船体船的(亦作multihulled)
examples: This award goes to the best multihull motor yacht (catamaran, trimaran, etc) launched in the past year by any brand worldwide.
Some dropped out due to costs, others because they didn't want to switch to multihull sailing.
The 60ft multihull fleet had been storm-bound for three days but set off in 20 knot breezes and flat seas.
Among the teams that set off were the highly rated duo of Britain's Ellen MacArthur and France's Alain Gautier on Foncia, an Open 60 Multihull.
